qaVerdict.identity: pass: wrinkles, round muzzle, folded ears, curled tail, red toy gloves, collar medallion, snack-belt, warm fawn palette, and compact pug boxer silhouette remain consistent across the row.
qaVerdict.scale: pass: generated frames have stable baseline/head height and normalized frames use fixed 256x256 cells.
qaVerdict.motion: pass: idle motion is subtle breathing/guard variation only, with no attack pose, teleporting, or unnatural body stretch.
qaVerdict.alpha: pass: normalized source has alpha and transparent corners; chroma green was removed for runtime-ready source form.
